title: Gravel to Flint
description: A mod that adds a lossy way of getting flint.
body:
![Gravel to Flint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d2a55e70e7be4843fe6fd8e82debf1f80a031c6.png)

## Description
Are you using a mod like [Slow Your Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/slow-your-roll) and want to make flint a little easier to obtain, but not too easy?  This mod may be for you.

### Features:
- Adds a shapeless crafting recipe to get 1 flint from 2 gravel
- If [Durability Damage Recipe](https://modrinth.com/mod/durabilitydamagerecipe) is installed, a recipe is added to get 1 flint from 1 gravel and a shovel

## Support
If you have a bug report, feature request, or any other type of issue, please post on our GitHub [issues page](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/issues).  This is an issues page for all of our mods, so be sure to include the mod's name and version in your post.  We appreciate all feedback!

If you'd like to support development, you can leave a tip at our [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/dentedleft).  Only if it's within your means- otherwise, using, sharing, and enjoying the mod is support enough.  Thank you!
